description: Style NoteThis fastrack watch gets a new season update in its styling and design details. For maximum impact, style this with your off-duty staples and throw on a few tonal accessories for added measure. This zingy time piece is sure to give a face-lift to your summer wardrobe!Product DetailsCase style:  Analog watch with steel quadrilateral case and an orange bezelDial style: Black dial with orange and silver hands and printed text on the dialStrap style: Black plastic strap with a tang claspFeatures: Branding on the dialWater resistant 50 M that can be used around sinks and rain splashesWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 46 mmCase thickness: 9 mm
